summary: Bootstrapping the handoff spine. slut is system of record (music_v4). track_identity joins on ISRC + content_sha256; hag consumes versioned exports, never raw tables.

open_questions: On BPM disagreement >2% between Apple MIR and provider, which source is authoritative?
summary: Reconstructed from HANDOFF_FROM_HAG_2026-07-01.md: audio-brain outputs (apple_hybrid_v1, sonic7_v1, loudness/cue handoff tables) are ready to join against slut identity. Spotify/ISRC bridge documented in memory spotify-isrc-bridge.md.
Example: web/phone sessions see only the git repo; DB and library are unmounted. Recorded so the next LOCAL session picks it up instead of dead-ending.
